suggested_titles.title: Red Structure, Blue Expanse
suggested_titles.subtitle: An abstract landscape of vivid color and bold geometry.
suggested_titles.description: A striking composition featuring a prominent red architectural form beneath a deep blue sky, punctuated by a luminous white disc and ascending ladders.

suggested_titles.title: Ascending Horizon
suggested_titles.subtitle: Journey through abstracted planes and vibrant light.
suggested_titles.description: Bold blocks of color define a surreal landscape with ladders leading to unseen heights, all under a vast, captivating blue sky with a singular celestial body.

suggested_titles.title: Vivid Landscape Geometry
suggested_titles.subtitle: Contemplative forms in a world of stark contrast.
suggested_titles.description: An exploration of form and color, presenting a simplified yet potent landscape with a dramatic red building, an expansive blue sky, and symbolic ladders connecting different planes.

contextual_proposals.context_role: Highlights the artwork's vibrant colors and architectural forms in a bright, inviting, and contemporary seasonal setting.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Airy, refined, sun-drenched, tranquil, summer/spring seasonal feel.
materials: Large arched window with sea view
contextual_proposals.lighting: Controlled Mediterranean sunlight, clear and soft, creating subtle, defined shadows and a gentle glow.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: soft editorial left-oblique physical view, 15-20 degrees, clearly non-frontal
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The soft oblique view reveals the artwork's physical thickness and depth, integrating it naturally into the elegant space while emphasizing its visual impact without being flat.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's bold red and deep blue resonate with traditional Mediterranean palettes, while its stark, abstract forms contrast beautifully with the organic textures and natural light of the setting. The ladders can evoke coastal paths or terraces.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Appeals to buyers seeking contemporary art for light-filled, sophisticated homes. The seasonal freshness aligns with current market trends for breathable interiors, making the artwork feel current and desirable.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: An original abstract artwork, in square format and vivid colors, is installed centrally above a light oak console table in a contemporary Mediterranean living room. The room features white limewash walls, a warm terracotta tiled floor, and a large arched window revealing a hint of sea view. A natural linen sofa is partially visible. Controlled Mediterranean sunlight streams in, casting soft, defined shadows. The camera is positioned in a soft editorial left-oblique physical view, 15-20 degrees, clearly non-frontal, capturing the artwork's physical thickness and scale within the elegant, airy space.
contextual_proposals.negative_prompt: no people, no animals, no poster, no flat print, no distortion, no fisheye, no incorrect scale, no cropped artwork, no altered artwork, no mirrored artwork, no generic vintage room, no winter default unless seasonally intended

contextual_proposals.context_role: Showcases the artwork's geometric precision and strong visual impact within a refined, minimalist contemporary setting.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Minimalist, clean, sophisticated, contemplative, modern luxury.
materials: Sculptural dark wood armchair (e.g., Pierre Jeanneret style)
contextual_proposals.lighting: Cool architectural daylight, soft and even, augmented by a focused gallery spotlight illuminating the artwork, creating subtle depth.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: three-quarter left view, soft left-oblique, 10-15 degrees
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The subtle left-oblique angle provides a dynamic yet elegant view, showcasing the artwork's presence and its depth against the stark architectural backdrop without flattening its image.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's clean lines and bold color blocks find a natural home in a modern architectural interior. The concrete and plaster materials provide a neutral yet textured backdrop, allowing the artwork's vibrant colors to stand out as a central feature.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Appeals to collectors and designers who favor minimalist aesthetics and seek art that can anchor a contemporary space with a powerful yet refined statement. Positions the artwork as a high-end design element.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: An original abstract artwork, in square format, is precisely mounted on a large, unadorned raw plaster wall in a contemporary architectural residence. The space features a polished concrete floor and a single, sculptural dark wood armchair. A tall, narrow window with black steel frames is partially visible. Cool architectural daylight provides soft, even illumination, enhanced by a focused gallery spotlight on the artwork. The camera takes a three-quarter left view, soft left-oblique, 10-15 degrees, subtly revealing the artwork's physical dimension.
contextual_proposals.negative_prompt: no people, no animals, no poster, no flat print, no distortion, no fisheye, no incorrect scale, no cropped artwork, no altered artwork, no mirrored artwork, no generic vintage room, no winter default unless seasonally intended

contextual_proposals.context_role: Emphasizes the artwork's contemplative quality and simplified forms through an elegant Eastern-inspired aesthetic.
contextual_proposals.space_type: Zen-inspired living area or tearoom in a modern Japanese home
contextual_proposals.lighting: Soft, diffused light filtered through shoji screens, with subtle, warm indirect illumination creating a gentle highlight on the artwork.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: three-quarter right view, soft right-oblique, 10-15 degrees
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: This view, slightly angled from the right, elegantly frames the artwork within the serene Eastern setting, allowing its subtle texture and form to be appreciated without distortion, maintaining a sense of calm sophistication.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's bold color blocks, especially the red and deep blue, find a respectful resonance in a Japanese aesthetic that values simplicity, contrast, and thoughtful placement. The ladders can evoke pathways or spiritual ascent, fitting a Zen context.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Expands the artwork's market appeal to buyers with an appreciation for refined Eastern design, demonstrating its versatility and ability to complement diverse, high-quality interiors beyond typical Western styles.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: An original abstract artwork, in square format, is mounted on a pale rice paper panel wall above a low, dark wood credenza in a Zen-inspired living area of a modern Japanese home. The room features a dark lacquered wood floor, a tatami mat section, and soft, diffused light filtering through shoji screens. A minimalist black metal floor lamp is subtly placed. Subtle, warm indirect illumination gently highlights the artwork. The camera provides a three-quarter right view, soft right-oblique, 10-15 degrees, showcasing the artwork's presence in the serene space.
contextual_proposals.negative_prompt: no people, no animals, no poster, no flat print, no distortion, no fisheye, no incorrect scale, no cropped artwork, no altered artwork, no mirrored artwork, no generic vintage room, no winter default unless seasonally intended

contextual_proposals.context_role: Positions the artwork within a historically rich, European intellectual and artistic context, enhancing its timeless appeal.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Refined, intellectual, slightly bohemian, aged elegance, chiaroscuro mood.
materials: Aged plaster walls with subtle patina
Rich velvet upholstery on an antique French armchair
Ornate brass-detailed bar cart or side table
contextual_proposals.lighting: Chiaroscuro-inspired historical light, with a concentrated warm glow from a period lamp highlighting the artwork and carefully curated surrounding objects.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: elevated high-angle architectural view, controlled view from above, not top-down, not surveillance-like
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The elevated view offers a sophisticated perspective of the artwork within its richly detailed environment, emphasizing its role as a centerpiece of a curated collection, while maintaining realistic scale.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The artwork's bold forms and hints of constructivism align with early to mid-20th-century European modernism. Placing it in a 1940s Parisian salon connects it to a golden age of art collecting and intellectual refinement, giving it historical weight and prestige.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Appeals to collectors interested in art with historical resonance and a sophisticated narrative. It broadens the artwork's perceived value beyond pure contemporary, suggesting it's a piece that transcends eras.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: An original abstract artwork, in square format, is displayed prominently on an aged plaster wall with subtle patina, acting as a focal point within a 1940s Parisian collector's salon. The room features dark chevron parquet flooring, an antique French armchair with rich velvet upholstery, and an ornate brass-detailed bar cart or side table. Chiaroscuro-inspired historical light, provided by a period lamp, casts a concentrated warm glow on the artwork and surrounding curated objects. The camera captures an elevated high-angle architectural view, controlled from above, not top-down, to showcase the artwork's integration into the elegant, historic space.
contextual_proposals.negative_prompt: no people, no animals, no poster, no flat print, no distortion, no fisheye, no incorrect scale, no cropped artwork, no altered artwork, no mirrored artwork, no generic vintage room, no winter default unless seasonally intended

contextual_proposals.context_role: Creates high visual drama, intensifying the artwork's vibrant colors and mysterious atmosphere through strong contrast.
contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Dark, intimate, sophisticated, contemplative, high contrast luxury.
contextual_proposals.lighting: Premium low ambient light with strong, focused gallery-style spotlighting directly on the artwork, creating dramatic chiaroscuro and making colors pop.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: controlled oblique low-angle / contrapicado, low camera looking upward across the artwork plane, artistic but believable scale
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: The low-angle view adds a sense of monumentality and respect to the artwork, allowing its vibrant colors to dominate against the deep shadows, enhancing its dramatic presence and physical depth.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: The intense colors of the artwork, particularly the red and blue, achieve maximum impact against a dark, moody backdrop. This setting amplifies the artwork's dramatic presence and contemplative depth, drawing the viewer's eye directly to its vivid details.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Appeals to a luxury market segment that values dramatic presentation and distinctive design. It showcases the artwork's ability to be a focal point in a rich, sophisticated interior, suitable for an evening viewing context.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: An original abstract artwork, in square format and vivid colors, is mounted on a dark stained oak panel wall above a black marble console in a private collector's study. The room features a deep charcoal velvet armchair and antique leather-bound books on shelves. Premium low ambient light is present, with strong, focused gallery-style spotlighting directly on the artwork, creating dramatic chiaroscuro. The camera provides a controlled oblique low-angle / contrapicado, looking upward across the artwork plane, creating an artistic yet believable sense of scale and presence.

contextual_proposals.context_role: Directly echoes the artwork's minimalist landscape and architectural essence, using raw, noble materials to create a coherent, monumental presentation.

contextual_proposals.atmosphere: Grand, serene, architectural, modern, contemplative, artwork-centric.
materials: Large format pale grey stone tiles
Expansive glass panels overlooking a minimalist abstract garden
contextual_proposals.lighting: Cool, expansive architectural daylight, with soft, ambient illumination, allowing the artwork's colors to be the primary focus.
contextual_proposals.camera_view: low floor wide 7/8 architectural view, controlled oblique depth, wide architectural view, no fisheye, no scale distortion
contextual_proposals.camera_angle_notes: This wide, low-angle architectural view frames the artwork monumentally within its expansive space, emphasizing its scale and integration into the environment, without distorting its physical attributes.
contextual_proposals.human_presence: No visible people or animals. Human context expressed through architecture, culture, objects, season, and refined interior atmosphere.
contextual_proposals.curatorial_reason: This environment draws directly from the artwork's inherent qualities: its blocky, architectural forms, its sense of an expansive, stylized landscape, and its mineral-like color palette. The raw concrete and stone create a perfect, harmonious backdrop.
contextual_proposals.commercial_reason: Positions the artwork as a substantial, museum-quality piece suitable for large-scale architectural projects and significant collections. Highlights its ability to command and define an important space.
contextual_proposals.mockup_prompt: An original abstract artwork, in square format, is hung centrally on a large, rough concrete wall, commanding attention in an expansive minimalist gallery-residence atrium with high ceilings. The space features large format pale grey stone tiles, and expansive glass panels looking out to a minimalist abstract garden. A low-slung dark metal bench is subtly placed in the foreground. Cool, expansive architectural daylight provides soft, ambient illumination, making the artwork's colors the main focus. The camera captures a low floor wide 7/8 architectural view, with controlled oblique depth, showcasing the artwork's scale within the grand space, without fisheye or scale distortion.
